label: Post-review fix loop
description: A scenario that keeps the execution prompt focused on reviewer findings and the fix loop.

INITIAL_REQUEST_AND_SUBSEQUENT_CONVERSAT.text: Build a trycycle explorer that lets me inspect path decisions, rendered prompts, and rerender diffs.
The strategy is approved; proceed with the static-site implementation.

USER_REQUEST_TRANSCRIPT.text: Build a trycycle explorer that lets me inspect path decisions, rendered prompts, and rerender diffs.

FULL_CONVERSATION_VERBATIM.text: Build a trycycle explorer that lets me inspect path decisions, rendered prompts, and rerender diffs.
Use browser snapshots and screenshot diffs at each step to verify legibility, attractiveness, and correctness.

bindings.POST_IMPLEMENTATION_REVIEW_FINDINGS_VERB:
